name: Amish Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not refrigerate.
2. Do not use a metal spoon.
3. Day 1 - Combine 1 cup sugar, 1 cup flour, and 1 cup milk in a resealable bowl or bag; stir with a wooden or plastic spoon.
4. Day 2 - Stir the mixture thoroughly.
5. Day 3 - Stir the mixture again.
6. Day 4 - Stir the mixture once more.
7. Day 5 - Add 1 cup milk, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup flour; stir until combined.
8. Day 6 - Stir the mixture.
9. Day 7 - Stir the mixture.
10. Day 8 - Stir the mixture.
11. Day 9 - Stir the mixture.
12. Day 10 - Add 1 cup milk, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup flour; stir until combined. Then split the batter among 4 containers. These are now starters. Give 3 away and keep 1. You can make Friendship Bread with what is left in your container.
